name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: Duncanville's Loanstar Title Loans at 422 E Camp Wisdom Rd offers quick title loans and payday advances to Texas residents with flexible terms.
description_long:
Located at 422 E Camp Wisdom Rd Suite 422 in Duncanville, TX, this standalone Loanstar Title Loans storefront serves residents seeking quick cash solutions. The office is conveniently positioned in the Duncanville community and operates Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM, with Saturday hours from 9AM to 2PM (closed Sundays). Walk-in customers can complete applications and receive approvals the same day.

Loanstar Title Loans in Duncanville specializes in auto title loans, payday advances, and installment loans for qualified borrowers. The Duncanville team can be reached at +1 972-298-1292 to discuss loan options, answer questions about rates and terms, or schedule an appointment. Staff members help customers understand repayment schedules and explore financing options suited to their situation.

If you need emergency cash in Duncanville, TX, bring a valid government ID, proof of income, and vehicle documentation (for title loans). Loanstar Title Loans has been serving customers across Texas with accessible credit solutions for years.
address: 422 E Camp Wisdom Rd Suite 422, Duncanville, TX 75116

company_info.headquarters: 422 E Camp Wisdom Rd Suite 422, Duncanville, TX 75116

pros: Large loan amounts available up to $10,000, higher than typical payday loans
Multiple convenient Fort Worth-area locations (5 locations documented)
Quick application process requiring only vehicle, photo ID, and clear title
Multiple payment method options: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Published fee schedules for transparency on costs for different loan amounts
Established company with 25+ years of operational history
Online account management, registration, and payment options available
cons: Title loans require vehicle collateral, risking repossession if you default
Website does not disclose APRs, making true cost comparison difficult
Limited information about repayment terms, loan duration, or renewal options
No mention of hardship programs, flexible payment plans, or debt counseling
Limited hours (closed Sundays and evenings) may inconvenience some borrowers
best_for: Vehicle owners with stable income who need emergency cash and can repay quickly
Borrowers in the Fort Worth DFW area seeking same-day or quick cash access
People with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best for Fort Worth-area vehicle owners facing immediate cash needs who can reliably repay within the loan term and understand the risk of vehicle repossession. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost collateral-based products; borrowers should only pursue this option after exhausting lower-cost alternatives and must carefully review the fee schedules and repayment terms before committing.
services: In-person loan application at 5+ Fort Worth-area locations
Payment via cash, check, debit card, or Western Union
Fee schedule disclosures for multiple loan amounts
Vehicle equity assessment and title verification
meta_description: Duncanville, TX | Loanstar Title Loans at 422 E Camp Wisdom Rd. Fast title loans and payday advances. Call 972-298-1292.
